title: Universal UI Preference: Toast Confirmations & Local History Pagination
insight: Whenever proposing or building front-end web apps: 1) Action Confirmation: Always include a visual toast/success message that temporarily appears when an item is submitted, accompanied by an auto-clear of the form. 2) Object History: Provide a local session history widget allowing the user to navigate backward/forward through the objects they have just interacted with or submitted.
